title: Scan Completion Funnel
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS scans FROM ScanOrganic WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT ScanType AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ScanOrganic WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY ScanType ORDER BY CASE ScanType WHEN 'Log' THEN 1 WHEN 'Sample' THEN 2 WHEN 'Analyse' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

details.text: {scans} organic scan event(s) recorded during the report period. The funnel from Log → Sample → Analyse shows your completion discipline — a perfect 1:1:1 ratio means you finished every biological you started; divergence means you walked away from some. The credit only pays on Analyse.
details.help: ScanOrganic ScanType values are Log (first contact), Sample (second), and Analyse (third and final). scans drives the title as the total scan event volume.

tagLines: Organic scan stage data compiled. Sample completion ratio noted in the xenobiology field report.
The first scan is free. The second one costs time. The third one pays. That's the deal.
Incomplete biologicals don't pay. Yours mostly complete. The funnel shows you're disciplined about it.
